global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting an app for booking travel easily.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a large square and a circle, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A smaller rectangle and circle that add visual interest, placed in the center.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Another set of geometric shapes that overlap with the main subject, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Another small icon
elements.description: A small rectangular icon positioned near the bottom, complementing the other elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'NomadLayer' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: A price tag in white text reading '€19.99' located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold colors, key elements include geometric shapes and clear text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NomadLayer, Book your next trip, Hotels + flights in one tap, €19.99, Install now
